creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

There are leftover files after pkg_delete. 
=== Checking filesystem state after all packages deleted 
================================================================ 
list of extra files and directories in / (not present on clean system but present after everything was deinstalled) 
5906136        8 drwxr-xr-x    2 root             wheel                 512 May 27 03:07 usr/local/etc/ssh 
5906144        8 -rw-------    1 root             wheel                 986 May 27 03:06 usr/local/etc/ssh/ssh_host_key 
5906146        8 -rw-r--r--    1 root             wheel                 651 May 27 03:06 usr/local/etc/ssh/ssh_host_key.pub 
5906101        8 -rw-------    1 root             wheel                 672 May 27 03:06 usr/local/etc/ssh/ssh_host_dsa_key 
5906106        8 -rw-r--r--    1 root             wheel                 611 May 27 03:06 usr/local/etc/ssh/ssh_host_dsa_key.pub 
5906110        8 -rw-------    1 root             wheel                1679 May 27 03:06 usr/local/etc/ssh/ssh_host_rsa_key 
5906113        8 -rw-r--r--    1 root             wheel                 403 May 27 03:06 usr/local/etc/ssh/ssh_host_rsa_key.pub 
5906115        8 -rw-------    1 root             wheel                 227 May 27 03:06 usr/local/etc/ssh/ssh_host_ecdsa_key 
5906117        8 -rw-r--r--    1 root             wheel                 183 May 27 03:06 usr/local/etc/ssh/ssh_host_ecdsa_key.pub 

This will take some work. 
Please submit a patch against the 6.0p1_2,1 port. 
If you need assistance, please join and send an email to freebsd-ports email list.
